name: css-ui-patterns
description: Modern CSS & UI patterns: animations, scroll effects, responsive layouts, accessibility, component patterns

entries.title: Scroll-Triggered Animations
entries.content: Use IntersectionObserver for scroll-triggered animations. Fade-in, slide-up, scale-in effects. Stagger children with animation-delay. CSS scroll-driven animations (modern browsers).

entries.title: Hero Section Patterns
entries.content: Full-viewport hero: min-h-screen with centered content. Gradient overlays on images. Animated background (gradient shift, particles). Responsive typography. CTA buttons with hover states.

entries.title: Card Component Variations
entries.content: Card patterns: basic (shadow + rounded), image top, horizontal (image left), overlay (image bg + gradient overlay), interactive (hover lift + shadow), skeleton loading.

entries.title: Accessibility (a11y) CSS Patterns
entries.content: Visually hidden text for screen readers. Focus indicators (focus-visible). Skip navigation links. Reduced motion media query. Sufficient color contrast. Touch target sizes (44px+).

entries.title: Container Queries for Component-Level Responsive Design
entries.content: Container queries: style based on parent size, not viewport. Use @container instead of @media. Define containment context with container-type. Works for reusable components in different layouts.
